promise.text: Every vehicle undergoes a comprehensive technical inspection before entering our showroom. Factory-standard revisions, complete documentation, personal review by our team — only what meets our standards is offered.

workshop.title: Master Workshop
workshop.subtitle: Specialised in the extraordinary
workshop.description: Our workshop is dedicated to sports cars and classics. Marques such as Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati and many more are in the finest hands with us.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & inspection
maintenance.text: Manufacturer-standard servicing for all sports car marques.

restoration.title: Classic car care

detailing.title: Detailing
detailing.text: Professional vehicle care at the highest level.

workshop.brands: Marques we trust — and who trust us

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Inspection
maintenance.subtitle: Manufacturer-standard servicing
maintenance.description: Regular maintenance is the best protection for your sports car. Our master-certified workshop carries out all inspections according to manufacturer specifications — with genuine parts, certified procedures, and the care that vehicles of this class deserve.
maintenance.features: Digital service history, Genuine parts from all manufacturers, Collection and delivery in Freiburg and surrounding areas, Courtesy vehicle on request

repair.title: Repair
repair.subtitle: Expert restoration to factory standard
repair.description: From diagnosis to repair — our team works with modern diagnostic equipment and genuine parts. Whether gearbox, suspension, or electronics: we understand the specifics of every marque and repair so precisely that you will not notice the difference — except that everything works perfectly again.
repair.features: Brand-specific diagnostic equipment, Genuine replacement parts, Transparent cost estimates, Documented repair history

klassiker.title: Classic Car Care
klassiker.subtitle: Devoted stewardship of automotive history
klassiker.description: Classic sports cars require special attention. Our specialists understand the mechanics, materials, and philosophy behind every classic. We care for your vehicle long-term — from seasonal storage to complete restoration.
klassiker.features: Climate-controlled storage, Regular exercise drives, Restoration planning, Value-preserving care

aufbereitung.title: Detailing
aufbereitung.subtitle: Professional care at the highest level
aufbereitung.description: Professional detailing restores your vehicle's brilliance — and protects it for the future. We work with the finest products and techniques: paint correction, ceramic coating, leather and interior care down to the smallest detail.
aufbereitung.features: Multi-stage paint correction, Ceramic coating, Leather and Alcantara care, Engine and underbody cleaning

cookie.title: Your Privacy
cookie.text: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience. You may choose which cookies you wish to allow.
cookie.necessaryDesc: Required for the basic functionality of the website.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the website.

vehicleDetail.contactText: Contact us for a no-obligation consultation, a test drive, or further information about this vehicle.
vehicleDetail.notFoundText: The vehicle you are looking for is no longer available.

q1.question: Which brands does Prestige Selections carry?
q1.answer: We specialise in Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, and Maserati. Our inventory includes both current models and selected classics from these marques.

q2.question: Can I view a vehicle before purchasing?
q2.answer: Of course. Schedule a personal appointment at our showroom in Freiburg. We take the time for a thorough viewing and answer all your questions — discreetly and without obligation.

q3.question: Does Prestige Selections offer a workshop for sports cars?
q3.answer: Yes. Our master-certified workshop with 5 specialists focuses on maintenance, repair, and detailing for sports cars and classics. We use genuine parts and manufacturer-standard procedures.

q4.question: What does the buying process look like?
q4.answer: After viewing, we prepare an individual offer. Every vehicle undergoes a comprehensive technical inspection before sale. We assist with registration, insurance, and financing if needed.

q5.question: Does Prestige Selections deliver vehicles nationwide?
q5.answer: Yes, we deliver throughout Germany and Europe on request. Many of our clients purchase after a personal consultation by phone or video and receive their vehicle delivered to their door.
